2026 Summerfest Lineup | Summerfest, The World's Largest Music Festival [![Image 2: 2026 Summerfest Logo](https://s3.summerfest.com/assets/images/sf-logo/sf25-website-logolockup-731.64x164.38-071525.svg)](https://www.summerfest.com/bannerclick/166)Toggle navigation *   [Tickets & Promotions](https://www.summerfest.com/tickets/) *   [Lineup](https://www.summerfest.com/lineup-wrapper/) *   [Stages](https://www.summerfest.com/stages/) *   [Experience](https://www.summerfest.com/event-info/) *   [Merch](https://www.summerfest.com/merch/) *   [Community](https://www.summerfest.com/c", "relevance_score": 0.8}, {"title": "Samsung IMEICheckFree \u2014CheckIf Original, Stolen or Blocked", "url": "https://imeicheck.com/samsung-imei-check", "snippet": "[Jina Extracted Content] Samsung Knox Guard is a cloud-based device management platform that allows carriers, insurance companies, leasing providers, and enterprise organizations to remotely control Samsung devices. It is primarily used for fraud and theft protection on financed devices. **How Knox Guard works:** When a carrier sells you a Samsung phone on installments, they register the device's IMEI in the Knox Guard console. From that point, the carrier can remotely lock the phone, display custom messages on the lock screen, restrict app installation, control SIM card changes, and even wipe the device \u2014 all without physical access. **Knox Guard status flow (from Samsung's official documentation):** Knox Guard devices go through a defined lifecycle of states: *   **OFF** \u2014 The device has never been enrolled in Knox Guard, or it was never accepted into the system. This is the ideal status for used phone buyers. No restrictions exist. *   **Pending** \u2014 The device IMEI has been uploaded to the Knox Guard console by a reseller, but not yet accepted by the managing organization. The device is not yet controlled. *   **Activating** \u2014 The device was accepted in Knox Guard, but has not yet connected to the internet to complete activation. Knox Guard will automatically activate when the device boots up and connects to a network (within 7 days of first boot). *   **Active** \u2014 The device is actively managed by Knox Guard. The managing organization can lock, unlock, send notifications, restrict apps, control SIM changes, block factory reset, and apply various policies. **A phone in Active state can be locked at any moment.** *   **Locked** \u2014 The managing organization has remotely locked the device. The phone displays a lock screen message and is completely unusable. This typically happens when a financed phone has unpaid installments. *   **Completing** \u2014 The managing organization has marked the device for release. There is a 2-day grace period during which this can be reversed. *   **Completed** \u2014 Knox Guard management is finished. The Knox Guard client is permanently uninstalled from the device. **This is a safe status for buyers** \u2014 it means the phone was previously managed (e.g., financed) but has been fully released. The device cannot be re-locked through Knox Guard. **Knox Guard cannot be removed by factory reset.** Even if you wipe the phone completely, Knox Guard will re-activate when the device connects to the internet. Only the managing organization (carrier, insurance company, or employer) can release a device from Knox Guard by marking it as \"Completed.\" **A factory reset alone does NOT prove a Samsung phone is clean.** Knox Guard, MDM, and Samsung Account Lock all survive a factory reset \u2014 they re-activate **the moment the device connects to the internet** (Wi-Fi or mobile data). A phone that appears clean in offline/airplane mode can become locked instantly once it goes online. **If you cannot verify the IMEI before buying, you MUST connect the device to the internet", "relevance_score": 0.8}, {"title": "AI Detector - Trusted AICheckerfor ChatGPT, GPT5 & Gemini", "url": "https://www.zerogpt.com/", "snippet": "[Jina Extracted Content] Title: Trusted AI Checker for ChatGPT, GPT5 & Gemini\nURL Source: https://www.zerogpt.com/\nPublished Time: Tue, 31 Mar 2026 22:23:58 GMT\nMarkdown Content:\n# AI Detector - Trusted AI Checker for ChatGPT, GPT5 & Gemini\n[Experience the best with our premium plans \u2013 unlock exclusive features now!](https://www.zerogpt.com/pricing)\n[![Image 8: ZeroGPT - Free Open AI Detection Tool](https://www.zerogpt.com/favicon.png)](https://www.zerogpt.com/)[ZeroGPT](https://www.zerogpt.com/)\nProducts\nProducts\nAI/GPT Detector\nZeroGPT the most Advanced and Reliable Chat GPT, GPT5 & AI Content Detector\nAI Humanizer\nRefine AI text into a more natural, human-like style while keeping the original meaning intact\nAI Image Detector\nDetect whether an image is AI-generated or human-made in seconds using advanced analysis\nPlagiarism Checker\nZeroGPT's Plagiarism Checker verifies originality by detecting duplicate content across billions of sources\nAI Paraphraser\nZeroGPT's AI-powered Paraphraser helps rewrite, edit and reformulate the tone of your text\nAI Grammar Check\nEnsure your writing is mistake-free.
